betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6High Pressure Pipe§f

§aThe core fluid transport block of Pressure Pipes!§f
§bHigh Pressure Pipes§f are the backbone of the §9Pressure Pipes§f mod. They can transfer any amount of fluid from inputs to outputs with §bunlimited throughput§f and zero loss.

§6Key Features§f:
§b• Unlimited throughput§f — No fluid quantity limits.
§b• Zero loss§f — All fluid is preserved during transport.
§b• Multi-fluid§f — Multiple fluids can travel through the same pipe simultaneously.
§b• Flexible routing§f — Pipes can be placed in any shape; loops and intersections work fine.
§b• FMP support§f — Compatible with ForgeMultipart covers (if installed).
§b• Cross-mod§f — Works with all Forge fluids and all pipes/tanks from other mods.

§6Filtering§f:
Pipe inputs, outputs, pumps, and drains can filter by fluid type.

§cWarning§f: Loops that connect an output back to itself without filtering will §4explode§f.
